resources.string: Yazh uses your device\'s camera to display an AR pet companion. For children under 13 (US) or under 18 (India), parental or guardian consent is required. Please review what data is collected and how it is used.
Camera access (required for AR pet display)
All processing happens on this device
No data is sent to cloud servers
I am the parent or legal guardian of this child, and I consent to the data practices described above.
Please enter a valid email address
